questions.question: What actor usually portrayed tough guys, with early success in The Magnificent Seven and The Dirty Dozen?
Name the 1962 Madeleine L'Engle young adult novel about Meg Murry and her time and space travel.
What song by the Turtles begins with "Imagine me and you, I do, I think about you day and night, it's only right"?
What playwright won the Pulitzer Prize in 1949 for his quintessential American drama, Death of a Salesman?
What was it called when people got out of their vehicle at a red light and ran around the car exchanging places?
